entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS137) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD CRITICAL ACCESS FOR T3 SERVICE AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU0878.01E. 2. TO REDUCE PRICING FOR SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU0870.02P. 3. TO REDUCE ACCESS PRICING FOR SPECIFIC NSC ETHS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU0879.01E. 4. TO ADD ACCESS PRICING FOR OC3 SERVICE AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU0886.01E. 5. TO ADD CRITICAL ACCESS FOR T1 SERVICE AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU0887.01E. 6. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU0868.02E

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL
